commands.review_summary:
The PR defers Gateway channel account startup until readiness, makes primary-model startup prewarm opt-in, keeps provider-auth warming on the read-only model catalog path, and adds focused regression coverage plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: no. independent runtime reproduction was established in this read-only review. Source inspection shows current main starts prewarm by default and schedules account startup during sidecar startup, while the PR body provides a configured Gateway trace showing the after-fix stall warning is gone.
commands.review_followup: The protected maintainer label and the intentional startup default change require maintainer review rather than an automated repair lane.

target.title: fix: avoid gateway startup event-loop stalls
target.body:
## Summary

- Defer channel account startup until the Gateway has completed the readiness handoff, so account-level channel work cannot starve HTTP readiness.
- Make startup primary-model prewarm opt-in while keeping provider auth warming on the read-only model catalog path.
- Add regression coverage for startup prewarm policy, deferred channel startup, and provider auth catalog loading.

## Verification

- `pnpm test src/gateway/server-startup.test.ts src/gateway/server-startup-post-attach.test.ts src/gateway/server-channels.test.ts src/agents/model-auth.test.ts src/agents/model-provider-auth.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --parallel-tests "pnpm test src/gateway/server-startup.test.ts src/gateway/server-startup-post-attach.test.ts src/gateway/server-channels.test.ts src/agents/model-auth.test.ts src/agents/model-provider-auth.test.ts"`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Gateway startup no longer lets channel account startup or model prewarm monopolize the event loop before readiness.
Real environment tested: local configured Gateway with Discord, Slack, and Telegram accounts in tmux.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_STARTUP_TRACE=1 pnpm gateway:watch --force`
Evidence after fix: latest tmux startup showed HTTP listening at 11:44:31, Gateway ready at 11:44:32, channels starting after readiness, and no `fetch-timeout ... timer delayed` warning in the latest run.
Observed result after fix: Discord, Slack, and Telegram startup progressed without the previous 30s event-loop starvation warning; provider auth prewarm finished after readiness.
What was not tested: full repository suite locally; PR CI is the broad proof for this branch.
target.author: steipete
